user_story: As a new user, I want to create an account using my email and password so that I can access the platform securely.
acceptance_criteria: User can enter email, username, and password
Confirmation message is shown after successful registration

user_story: As a registered user, I want to log in to my account so that I can access my boards and tasks.
acceptance_criteria: User can log in with valid credentials

user_story: As a user, I want to create a workspace so that I can organize multiple projects under one space.
As a workspace admin, I want to invite team members so that they can collaborate on projects.
acceptance_criteria: Admin can send invitation via email
User can accept or reject invitation

user_story: As a user, I want to create a project board so that I can manage tasks visually.
acceptance_criteria: Board has a name and description
Board is linked to a workspace
Board creator is assigned admin role

user_story: As a board admin, I want to add members to a board so that they can contribute to tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Users can be added or removed

user_story: As a user, I want to create lists (e.g., To Do, In Progress, Done) so that I can organize tasks by status.
acceptance_criteria: User can create, rename, and delete lists

user_story: As a user, I want to create tasks within lists so that I can track work items.
As a user, I want to assign tasks to team members so that responsibilities are clear.
acceptance_criteria: Task can have one or multiple assignees

user_story: As a user, I want to drag and drop tasks between lists so that I can update task progress.
As a user, I want to set due dates for tasks so that deadlines are tracked.
acceptance_criteria: User can select date and time

user_story: As a user, I want to comment on tasks so that I can communicate with team members.
As a user, I want to attach files to tasks so that I can share relevant documents.
As a user, I want to receive notifications so that I stay updated on project activity.
acceptance_criteria: Notifications for task assignment, comments, deadlines

user_story: As a project manager, I want to view activity logs so that I can monitor team contributions.
acceptance_criteria: Logs include task creation, updates, and assignments
